name: Noah
message: Hey I made it in the blog! Lovely article 💙

name: Pablo
message: Espectacular! gracias por compartir tus pensamientos

name: Kelly
message: That is a good perspective to look at the situation with !!! Good luck on your adventure and many nights of good sleep!

name: Erin
message: I love everything about this! Sending you good vibes from Maui, love from my heart and wishes for as little camp despair as possible!

name: Mom
message: Wonderful thoughts! Thanks for sharing them.

name: Andrés y Marcela
message: Admirable Lauris, por favor síguenos compartiendo tus pensamientos, muy bien escritos además!

name: Alejo y Cuca
message: 🥲 proud tears reading your post. ❤️❤️❤️ you’re amazing!

name: Renea
message: Found your page from Noah's bon voyage post and I'm so glad I found it. Beautiful blog post! Can't wait to follow along on your journey! Hope you always have a dry pair of socks at the end of the day and your travels stay safe!

name: Ashley
message: This is so amazing , keep going girl! You got this!!!

name: Sloan
message: Found your blog from Noah’s send off video. Thanks for sharing your thoughts on the trail! They’re inspiring. Keep going! I hope to continue to follow your blog to see updates. Happy trails!

name: Lindsay; Portland, OR
message:
“Make your bed and do the next right thing.” Thank you for that! I’m writing that one down for my bedroom wall and going to think of you and your quest to get myself motivated for my day. This venture that you’re on is so inspiring! I love reading your blogs. You’re a great writer. 

Also, I love the pictures! Lasagna is my favorite food. Yum! Never knew it existed in camp food form. lol

I hope you’re safe, dry, and warm out there and have less camp despair days and more “Holy shit, I am so bad ass out here!” days. ❤️
